executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed with HTTP 500 Internal Server Error. No Maven build was executed due to GitHub Actions workflow dispatch failure.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow dispatch returned HTTP 500 Internal Server Error
errors.root_cause: GitHub API returned 500 error when attempting to trigger workflow. This could be due to: 1) Invalid workflow file path or configuration, 2) GitHub API service issues, 3) Repository permissions or authentication problems, 4) Workflow file syntax errors preventing dispatch
recommended_fix: Check workflow file syntax is valid YAML
Verify GitHub token has 'workflow' scope permissions
Check repository settings allow Actions to run
Review workflow triggers and ensure dispatch event is properly configured
If GitHub API is experiencing issues, retry after some time
Validate the workflow file has proper 'workflow_dispatch' trigger defined

steps: Parse YAML syntax to detect configuration errors
Check required inputs are properly defined
Validate job definitions and steps syntax

errors.compliance_notes: Workflow dispatch failures must be logged for audit trail. Verify CI/CD pipeline security controls are not blocking legitimate workflow triggers.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline blockage - no build execution possible until workflow dispatch is fixed

audit_log.analyzed_by: Senior DevOps Automation Engineer - Build Error Classifier Agent
audit_log.next_steps: Validate workflow configuration before attempting next build
